parents.subject: LU-19851 osp: check imp before access in osp_statfs()

commit.subject: LU-19890 mdc: initialize obd_lu_dev before procfs entries
commit.message:
LU-19890 mdc: initialize obd_lu_dev before procfs entries

1) initialize obd_lu_dev early, before procfs entries
   to prevent access via non-initialized mdc data via
   procfs entries
2) remove procfs entries before any mdc structures
   the entries can access

Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
